Login.title: Sign in
Login.subtitle: Log in to your account
Login.resetSuccess: Password updated. Sign in with your new password.

errors.AccessDenied: Access denied by Google. Your account is not authorized yet — contact the administrator.
errors.Callback: Google sign-in error. Try again or use email/password.
errors.OAuthCallback: Google sign-in error. Try again or use email/password.
errors.OAuthSignin: Unable to start Google sign-in. Check your connection and try again.
errors.Configuration: Google sign-in not configured. Use email/password.

Register.subtitle: Choose your profile to get started
Register.referralBanner: You were referred — reduced commission of 13% for 3 months.

Register.marketingConsent: I agree to receive communications and news from perform-learn.fr (optional)

ForgotPassword.title: Forgot password
ForgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email to receive a reset link.
ForgotPassword.sentMessage: If an account exists for {email}, you will receive an email in a few minutes.
ForgotPassword.sentHint: Check your spam folder if you don't receive it.
ForgotPassword.errorDefault: An error occurred. Please try again.
